content:
===BEGIN===
For years, she was there—my constant companion in dreams. Always the same girl, with her knowing smile and quiet presence. We shared secrets, laughter, fears. She was real in a way no one else ever was. Yet, when I met her in person years later, the warmth vanished. She glanced at me, eyes sharp with recognition, then turned away, avoiding my gaze. I called out, but she slipped past like a shadow reluctant to be caught. Why did she know me? Why did she run? My mind raced for answers—could my dreams have been more than imagination? Was she some echo of my past, or something else entirely? The rational part of me, skeptical and wary, wanted to dismiss it all as coincidence or wishful thinking. But the ache of unanswered questions tugged at me, insisting that some mysteries, no matter how strange, demand to be faced.  
===END===
